---
title: "Dorothea Beale"
---

## Dorothea Beale

**Dates:** (1831-1906)

### Description

headmistress of Cheltenham Ladies College, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1882)

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 18th [1890]
- Letter from January 15, 1890.
- Letter from Jany 13th 1890

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
